meta.title: Bilateral Bulletin - Japan India Business Bureau
meta.description: Subscribe to JIBB's newsletter for weekly updates, market insights, and bilateral developments between Japan and India.

hero.title: The Bilateral Bulletin
hero.subtitle: Get deep-dive market insights, bilateral policy updates, and business briefs on the Japan-India corridor delivered directly to your inbox.

form.title: Subscribe to the Bulletin
form.ctaText: Join the amazing group of businessmen around India and Japan
form.successDesc: Thank you for subscribing to Japan-India Business Bureau (JIBB). You will receive our next briefing directly in your inbox.
form.alreadySubscribedDesc: Your email address is already registered on our newsletter list. We look forward to sharing our next briefing with you!
form.emailErrorText: The subscription service is facing temporary issues. Try again later or directly write to
form.errorConnection: Subscription error. Please check your internet connection.
form.secureNotice: No spam. Unsubscribe at any time. Your data is handled securely.
form.linkedinText: Follow us on LinkedIn for daily updates
form.linkedinTopic1: Bilateral Policy Updates: Real-time alerts on PLI schemes, semiconductor tariffs, and trade regulations.
form.linkedinTopic2: Real-time Delegation News: Photos and summaries from bilateral summits, roundtables, and industrial park tours.
form.linkedinTopic3: Strategic JV Alerts: Public announcements of collaborative engineering and supply chain partnerships.

membershipCTA.title: Looking for Deeper Intelligence?
membershipCTA.subtitle: Free subscribers receive public updates. Become a JIBB Member to unlock our complete policy PDF reports, raw semiconductor databases, and bilateral business-matching services.

features.title: Subscriber Benefits
features.item1Desc: First-hand analysis of policy shifts, PLI scheme adjustments, and joint-venture opportunities.
features.item2Desc: Key data points and briefs on high-growth sectors: semiconductors, EV, green hydrogen, and infrastructure.
features.item3Desc: Priority registration and notifications for bilateral delegations, business matching events, and summits.

archives.title: Past Bulletin Editions
archives.subtitle: Take a look at what you've been missing. Explore highlights from our recent weekly releases.
archives.issue14Desc: Analysis of the new bilateral agreement focusing on semiconductor packaging technology transfers, raw supply security, and combined fab talent programs.
archives.issue13Title: Issue #13: EV Components & Parts Localization Dynamics
archives.issue13Desc: A complete breakdown of domestic content requirements, export tariff exemptions, and collaborative research initiatives in electric mobility.
archives.issue12Title: Issue #12: Strategic Digital Trade Corridors Roadmap
archives.issue12Desc: Details on how G2B customs clearances are being streamlined through shared electronic documentation, reducing freight times by up to 35%.
